client.c(3) Library Functions Manual client.c(3)

NAME

client.c

SYNOPSIS

Enumerations


enum connection_state_t { CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED = 0, CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTING = 1, CONNECTION_STATE_HANDSHAKE = 2, CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTED = 3, CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR = 4 }

Functions


EM_JS (void, js_send_raw_packet,(const uint8_t *packet_data, size_t packet_len), { if(!Module.sendPacketCallback) { console.error('[WASM] sendPacketCallback not registered - cannot send packet');return;} const packetArray=new Uint8Array(HEAPU8.buffer, packet_data, packet_len);const packetCopy=new Uint8Array(packetArray);var pktType=packetCopy.length >=10 ?((packetCopy[8]<< 8)|packetCopy[9]) :-1;console.error('[WASM->JS] Sending raw packet:', packetCopy.length, 'bytes, type=0x'+pktType.toString(16));Module.sendPacketCallback(packetCopy);})
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_init_with_args (const char *args_json)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE void client_cleanup (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_generate_keypair (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_set_server_address (const char *server_host, int server_port)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE char * client_get_public_key_hex (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_handle_key_exchange_init (const uint8_t *packet, size_t packet_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_handle_crypto_parameters (const uint8_t *packet, size_t packet_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_handle_auth_challenge (const uint8_t *packet, size_t packet_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_handle_handshake_complete (const uint8_t *packet, size_t packet_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_encrypt_packet (const uint8_t *plaintext, size_t plaintext_len, uint8_t *ciphertext, size_t ciphertext_size, size_t *out_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_decrypt_packet (const uint8_t *ciphertext, size_t ciphertext_len, uint8_t *plaintext, size_t plaintext_size, size_t *out_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE char * client_parse_packet (const uint8_t *raw_packet, size_t packet_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_serialize_packet (uint16_t packet_type, const uint8_t *payload, size_t payload_len, uint32_t client_id, uint8_t *output, size_t *out_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_send_video_frame (const uint8_t *rgba_data, int width, int height)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_get_connection_state (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE void client_free_string (char *ptr)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_opus_encoder_init (int sample_rate, int channels, int bitrate)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_opus_decoder_init (int sample_rate, int channels)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_opus_encode (const int16_t *pcm_data, int frame_size, uint8_t *opus_data, int max_opus_bytes)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_opus_decode (const uint8_t *opus_data, int opus_bytes, int16_t *pcm_data, int frame_size, int decode_fec)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE void client_opus_encoder_cleanup (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE void client_opus_decoder_cleanup (void)

Enumeration Type Documentation

enum connection_state_t

Enumerator

CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED
CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTING
CONNECTION_STATE_HANDSHAKE
CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTED

Definition at line 116 of file src/web/client.c.

116              {
117   CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED = 0,
118   CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTING = 1,
119   CONNECTION_STATE_HANDSHAKE = 2,
120   CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTED = 3,
121   CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR = 4

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  void client_cleanup (void )


Definition at line 180 of file src/web/client.c.


180                           {
181 
182   // Clean up crypto handshake context
183   crypto_handshake_destroy(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx);
184   memset(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, 0, sizeof(g_crypto_handshake_ctx));
185 
186   g_handshake_complete = false;
187   g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED;
188   g_initialized = false;
189   term_renderer_glyph_cache_cleanup();
190   options_state_destroy();
191   platform_destroy();
192 
193 }






References CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED,
    crypto_handshake_destroy(), options_state_destroy(),
    platform_destroy(), and
  term_renderer_glyph_cache_cleanup().






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_decrypt_packet (const uint8_t * ciphertext, size_t
  ciphertext_len, uint8_t * plaintext, size_t plaintext_size, size_t *
  out_len)


Decrypt a ciphertext packet


Parameters


ciphertext Input ciphertext data


ciphertext_len Length of ciphertext


plaintext Output buffer (allocated by caller, must be at least
  ciphertext_len)


plaintext_size Size of plaintext buffer


out_len Output parameter for plaintext length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 549 of file src/web/client.c.


550                                            {
551   if (!g_handshake_complete) {
552     return -1;
553   }
554 
555   // Decrypt the packet using handshake context's crypto context
556   size_t plaintext_len = 0;
557   crypto_result_t result = crypto_decrypt(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx.crypto_ctx, ciphertext, ciphertext_len, plaintext,
558                                           plaintext_size, &plaintext_len);
559   if (result != CRYPTO_OK) {
560     return -1;
561   }
562 
563   *out_len = plaintext_len;
564   return 0;
565 }






References crypto_decrypt(), and CRYPTO_OK.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_encrypt_packet (const uint8_t * plaintext, size_t

  out_len)


Encrypt a plaintext packet


Parameters


plaintext Input plaintext data


plaintext_len Length of plaintext


ciphertext Output buffer (allocated by caller, must be at least
  plaintext_len + crypto_aead_overhead)


ciphertext_size Size of ciphertext buffer


out_len Output parameter for ciphertext length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 521 of file src/web/client.c.


522                                            {
523   if (!g_handshake_complete) {
524     return -1;
525   }
526 
527   // Encrypt the packet using handshake context's crypto context
528   size_t ciphertext_len = 0;
529   crypto_result_t result = crypto_encrypt(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx.crypto_ctx, plaintext, plaintext_len, ciphertext,
530                                           ciphertext_size, &ciphertext_len);
531   if (result != CRYPTO_OK) {
532     return -1;
533   }
534 
535   *out_len = ciphertext_len;
536   return 0;
537 }

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_generate_keypair (void )


Generate client keypair for handshake


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 204 of file src/web/client.c.


204                                   {
205 
206   if (!g_initialized) {
207     return -1;
208   }
209 
210   // Reset handshake context if previously used (reconnection / React Strict Mode remount)
211   if (g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state != CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED) {
212     crypto_handshake_destroy(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx);
213     memset(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, 0, sizeof(g_crypto_handshake_ctx));
214     g_handshake_complete = false;
215   }
216 
217   // Initialize crypto handshake context
218   asciichat_error_t result = crypto_handshake_init("wasm-client", &g_crypto_handshake_ctx, false /* is_server */);
219   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
220     return -1;
221   }
222 
223   g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED;
224   return 0;
225 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED, crypto_handshake_destroy(),
    CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED, and crypto_handshake_init().

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  char * client_get_public_key_hex (void )


Get client public key as hex string


Returns


Allocated hex string (caller must free with
  client_free_string), or NULL on error


Definition at line 255 of file src/web/client.c.


255                                       {
256   if (g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state == CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED) {
257     return NULL;
258   }
259 
260   // Get public key from handshake context
261   const uint8_t *pubkey = g_crypto_handshake_ctx.crypto_ctx.public_key;
262   if (!pubkey) {
263     return NULL;
264   }
265 
266   // Allocate buffer for hex string (32 bytes = 64 hex chars + null terminator)
267   char *hex_buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(65, char *);
268   if (!hex_buffer) {
269     return NULL;
270   }
271 
272   // Convert public key to hex
273   for (int i = 0; i < 32; i++) {
274     snprintf(hex_buffer + (i * 2), 3, "%02x", pubkey[i]);
275   }
276   hex_buffer[64] = '\0';
277 
278   return hex_buffer;
279 }






References CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED, and
    SAFE_MALLOC.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_handle_auth_challenge (const uint8_t * packet, size_t
  packet_len)


Handle CRYPTO_AUTH_CHALLENGE packet from server


Parameters


packet Raw packet data including header


packet_len Total packet length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 412 of file src/web/client.c.


412                                                                            {
413 
414   if (!packet || packet_len == 0) {
415     return -1;
416   }
417 
418   // Extract packet type and payload
419   if (packet_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
420     return -1;
421   }
422 
423   const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)packet;
424   packet_type_t packet_type = ntohs(header->type);
425   const uint8_t *payload_src = packet + sizeof(packet_header_t);
426   size_t payload_len = packet_len - sizeof(packet_header_t);
427 
428 
429   // Allocate payload copy from buffer pool (crypto function takes ownership and frees it)
430   uint8_t *payload = NULL;
431   if (payload_len > 0) {
432     payload = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, payload_len);
433     if (!payload) {
434       g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
435       return -1;
436     }
437     memcpy(payload, payload_src, payload_len);
438   }
439 
440   // Process auth challenge
441   asciichat_error_t result = crypto_handshake_client_auth_response(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, &g_wasm_transport,
442                                                                    packet_type, payload, payload_len);
443 
444 
445   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
446     g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
447     return -1;
448   }
449 
450   return 0;
451 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, buffer_pool_alloc(),
    CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR,
    crypto_handshake_client_auth_response(), and
    packet_header_t::type.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_handle_crypto_parameters (const uint8_t * packet, size_t
  packet_len)


Handle CRYPTO_PARAMETERS packet from server Sets up the key size
    negotiation before KEY_EXCHANGE_INIT


Parameters


packet Raw packet data including header


packet_len Total packet length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 359 of file src/web/client.c.


359                                                                               {
360 
361   if (!packet || packet_len == 0) {
362     return -1;
363   }
364 
365   // Extract packet type and payload
366   if (packet_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
367     return -1;
368   }
369 
370   const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)packet;
371   packet_type_t packet_type = ntohs(header->type);
372   const uint8_t *payload_src = packet + sizeof(packet_header_t);
373   size_t payload_len = packet_len - sizeof(packet_header_t);
374 
375 
376   // Allocate payload copy from buffer pool
377   uint8_t *payload = NULL;
378   if (payload_len > 0) {
379     payload = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, payload_len);
380     if (!payload) {
381       g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
382       return -1;
383     }
384     memcpy(payload, payload_src, payload_len);
385   }
386 
387   // Process crypto parameters
388   asciichat_error_t result = crypto_handshake_set_parameters(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx,
389                                                               (const crypto_parameters_packet_t *)payload);
390 
391 
392   // Free payload
393   if (payload) {
394     buffer_pool_free(NULL, payload, payload_len);
395   }
396 
397   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
398     g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
399     return -1;
400   }
401 
402   return 0;
403 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, buffer_pool_alloc(),
    buffer_pool_free(), CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR,
    crypto_handshake_set_parameters(), and
  packet_header_t::type.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_handle_handshake_complete (const uint8_t * packet, size_t
  packet_len)


Handle CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_COMPLETE packet from server


Parameters


packet Raw packet data including header


packet_len Total packet length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 460 of file src/web/client.c.


460                                                                                {
461 
462   if (!packet || packet_len == 0) {
463     return -1;
464   }
465 
466   // Extract packet type and payload
467   if (packet_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
468     return -1;
469   }
470 
471   const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)packet;
472   packet_type_t packet_type = ntohs(header->type);
473   const uint8_t *payload_src = packet + sizeof(packet_header_t);
474   size_t payload_len = packet_len - sizeof(packet_header_t);
475 
476 
477   // Allocate payload copy from buffer pool (crypto function takes ownership and frees it)
478   uint8_t *payload = NULL;
479   if (payload_len > 0) {
480     payload = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, payload_len);
481     if (!payload) {
482       g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
483       return -1;
484     }
485     memcpy(payload, payload_src, payload_len);
486   }
487 
488   // Complete handshake (takes ownership of payload and will free it)
489   asciichat_error_t result =
490       crypto_handshake_client_complete(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, &g_wasm_transport, packet_type, payload, payload_len);
491 
492 
493   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
494     g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
495     return -1;
496   }
497 
498   g_handshake_complete = true;
499   g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTED;
500 
501   // Update transport with the crypto context so ACIP can encrypt/decrypt packets
502   g_wasm_transport.crypto_ctx = &g_crypto_handshake_ctx.crypto_ctx;
503 
504   return 0;
505 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, buffer_pool_alloc(),
    CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTED, CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR,
    crypto_handshake_client_complete(), and
  packet_header_t::type.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_handle_key_exchange_init (const uint8_t * packet, size_t
  packet_len)


Handle CRYPTO_KEY_EXCHANGE_INIT packet from server This is the
    first step of the crypto handshake


Parameters


packet Raw packet data including header


packet_len Total packet length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 289 of file src/web/client.c.


289                                                                               {
290 
291   // Safety check: if handshake context is not in INIT state, reinitialize it
292   // This handles cases where previous handshakes weren't properly cleaned up
293   if (g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state != CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_INIT) {
294 
295     // Destroy and reset
296     if (g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state != CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED) {
297       crypto_handshake_destroy(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx);
298     }
299     memset(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, 0, sizeof(g_crypto_handshake_ctx));
300 
301     // Reinitialize to INIT state
302     asciichat_error_t init_result = crypto_handshake_init("wasm-client", &g_crypto_handshake_ctx, false);
303     if (init_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
304       return -1;
305     }
306   }
307 
308   if (!packet || packet_len == 0) {
309     return -1;
310   }
311 
312   // Extract packet type and payload
313   if (packet_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
314     return -1;
315   }
316 
317   const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)packet;
318   packet_type_t packet_type = ntohs(header->type);
319   const uint8_t *payload_src = packet + sizeof(packet_header_t);
320   size_t payload_len = packet_len - sizeof(packet_header_t);
321 
322 
323   // Allocate payload copy from buffer pool (crypto function takes ownership and frees it)
324   // The raw packet pointer from JS cannot be passed directly because the crypto
325   // handshake function calls buffer_pool_free() on the payload when done.
326   uint8_t *payload = NULL;
327   if (payload_len > 0) {
328     payload = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, payload_len);
329     if (!payload) {
330       g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
331       return -1;
332     }
333     memcpy(payload, payload_src, payload_len);
334   }
335 
336   // Process key exchange using transport-abstracted handshake
337 
338   asciichat_error_t result = crypto_handshake_client_key_exchange(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, &g_wasm_transport,
339                                                                   packet_type, payload, payload_len);
340 
341 
342   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
343     g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
344     return -1;
345   }
346 
347   g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_HANDSHAKE;
348   return 0;
349 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, buffer_pool_alloc(),
    CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR, CONNECTION_STATE_HANDSHAKE,
    crypto_handshake_client_key_exchange(),
    crypto_handshake_destroy(), CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED,
    CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_INIT, crypto_handshake_init(), and
    packet_header_t::type.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_init_with_args (const char * args_json)


Initialize client mode with command-line style arguments


Parameters


args_json Space-separated string of argument
  strings, e.g. "client --width 80 --height 40"


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 136 of file src/web/client.c.


136                                                  {
137 
138   // Parse space-separated arguments
139   char *args_copy = NULL;
140   char *argv[64] = {NULL};
141   int argc = wasm_parse_args(args_json, argv, 64, &args_copy);
142   if (argc < 0) {
143     return -1;
144   }
145 
146   // Initialize options (sets up RCU, defaults, etc.)
147   asciichat_error_t err = options_init(argc, argv);
148   free(args_copy);
149 
150   if (g_initialized) {
151     return -1;
152   }
153 
154   // Initialize platform layer
155   err = platform_init();
156   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
157     return -1;
158   }
159 
160   // Initialize logging to stderr (console.error in browser)
161   log_init(NULL, LOG_DEBUG, true, false);
162   // Use debug-style format in WASM so browser console shows full log headers
163   log_set_format(OPT_LOG_TEMPLATE_DEFAULT_DEBUG, false);
164   log_info("WASM client initialized via logging system");
165 
166   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
167     return -1;
168   }
169 
170   // Initialize ANSI color code generation
171   ansi_fast_init();
172 
173   g_initialized = true;
174   g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED;
175 
176   return 0;
177 }






References ansi_fast_init(), ASCIICHAT_OK,
    CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED, LOG_DEBUG, log_info,
    log_init(), log_set_format(),
    OPT_LOG_TEMPLATE_DEFAULT_DEBUG, options_init(),
    platform_init(), and wasm_parse_args().






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_opus_decode (const uint8_t * opus_data, int opus_bytes,
  int16_t * pcm_data, int frame_size, int decode_fec)


Decode Opus audio to PCM


Parameters


opus_data Input Opus data


opus_bytes Length of Opus data


pcm_data Output buffer for PCM samples (Int16)


frame_size Maximum number of samples per channel


decode_fec Whether to use FEC


Returns


Number of samples decoded per channel, or -1 on
  error


Definition at line 772 of file src/web/client.c.


772                                                                                                                     {
773   if (!g_opus_decoder) {
774     return -1;
775   }
776 
777   int decoded_samples = opus_decode(g_opus_decoder, opus_data, opus_bytes, pcm_data, frame_size, decode_fec);
778   if (decoded_samples < 0) {
779     return -1;
780   }
781 
782   return decoded_samples;
783 }










EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  void client_opus_decoder_cleanup (void )


Cleanup Opus decoder


Definition at line 800 of file src/web/client.c.


800                                        {
801   if (g_opus_decoder) {
802     opus_decoder_destroy(g_opus_decoder);
803     g_opus_decoder = NULL;
804   }
805 }










EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_opus_decoder_init (int sample_rate, int channels)


Initialize Opus decoder


Parameters


sample_rate Sample rate (8000, 16000, 24000, or
  48000)


channels Number of channels (1=mono, 2=stereo)


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 725 of file src/web/client.c.


725                                                             {
726   if (g_opus_decoder) {
727     opus_decoder_destroy(g_opus_decoder);
728     g_opus_decoder = NULL;
729   }
730 
731   int error;
732   g_opus_decoder = opus_decoder_create(sample_rate, channels, &error);
733   if (error != OPUS_OK || !g_opus_decoder) {
734     return -1;
735   }
736 
737   return 0;
738 }










EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_opus_encode (const int16_t * pcm_data, int frame_size,
  uint8_t * opus_data, int max_opus_bytes)


Encode PCM audio to Opus


Parameters


pcm_data Input PCM data (Int16 samples)


frame_size Number of samples per channel


opus_data Output buffer for Opus data


max_opus_bytes Maximum size of output buffer


Returns


Number of bytes encoded, or -1 on error


Definition at line 749 of file src/web/client.c.


749                                                                                                         {
750   if (!g_opus_encoder) {
751     return -1;
752   }
753 
754   int encoded_bytes = opus_encode(g_opus_encoder, pcm_data, frame_size, opus_data, max_opus_bytes);
755   if (encoded_bytes < 0) {
756     return -1;
757   }
758 
759   return encoded_bytes;
760 }

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_opus_encoder_init (int sample_rate, int channels, int
  bitrate)


Initialize Opus encoder


Parameters


sample_rate Sample rate (8000, 16000, 24000, or
  48000)


channels Number of channels (1=mono, 2=stereo)


bitrate Target bitrate in bits/sec


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 700 of file src/web/client.c.


700                                                                          {
701   if (g_opus_encoder) {
702     opus_encoder_destroy(g_opus_encoder);
703     g_opus_encoder = NULL;
704   }
705 
706   int error;
707   g_opus_encoder = opus_encoder_create(sample_rate, channels, OPUS_APPLICATION_VOIP, &error);
708   if (error != OPUS_OK || !g_opus_encoder) {
709     return -1;
710   }
711 
712   // Set bitrate
713   opus_encoder_ctl(g_opus_encoder, OPUS_SET_BITRATE(bitrate));
714 
715   return 0;
716 }






References OPUS_APPLICATION_VOIP.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  char * client_parse_packet (const uint8_t * raw_packet, size_t
  packet_len)


Parse a raw packet and return JSON metadata


Parameters


raw_packet Raw packet bytes including header


packet_len Length of raw packet


Returns


Allocated JSON string with packet metadata (caller must
  free), or NULL on error


Definition at line 574 of file src/web/client.c.


574                                                                         {
575   if (!raw_packet || packet_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
576     return NULL;
577   }
578 
579   // Parse packet header directly from bytes
580   const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)raw_packet;
581 
582   // Validate magic number (convert from network byte order)
583   uint64_t magic = NET_TO_HOST_U64(header->magic);
584   if (magic != PACKET_MAGIC) {
585     return NULL;
586   }
587 
588   // Convert header fields from network byte order
589   uint16_t type = NET_TO_HOST_U16(header->type);
590   uint32_t length = NET_TO_HOST_U32(header->length);
591   uint32_t client_id = NET_TO_HOST_U32(header->client_id);
592   uint32_t crc32 = NET_TO_HOST_U32(header->crc32);
593 
594   // Build JSON response with packet metadata
595   char *json = SAFE_MALLOC(1024, char *);
596   if (!json) {
597     return NULL;
598   }
599 
600   snprintf(json, 1024, "{\"type\":%u,\"length\":%u,\"client_id\":%u,\"crc32\":%u}", type, length, client_id, crc32);
601 
602   return json;
603 }






References packet_header_t::client_id,
    packet_header_t::crc32, packet_header_t::length,
    packet_header_t::magic, NET_TO_HOST_U16,
    NET_TO_HOST_U32, NET_TO_HOST_U64, PACKET_MAGIC,
    SAFE_MALLOC, and packet_header_t::type.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_send_video_frame (const uint8_t * rgba_data, int width, int
  height)


Process a video frame and prepare it for sending


Parameters


rgba_data RGBA pixel data from canvas


width Frame width


height Frame height


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 652 of file src/web/client.c.


652                                                                              {
653   if (!g_initialized) {
654     return -1;
655   }
656 
657   // This is a placeholder - actual implementation would:
658   // 1. Convert RGBA to target format (e.g., compress with libjpeg-turbo)
659   // 2. Build frame packet
660   // 3. Encrypt if handshake complete
661   // 4. Return serialized packet via callback to JS
662 
663   return 0;
664 }










EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_serialize_packet (uint16_t packet_type, const uint8_t
  * payload, size_t payload_len, uint32_t client_id, uint8_t *
  output, size_t * out_len)


Serialize a packet structure to raw bytes


Parameters


packet_type Type of packet


payload Packet payload data


payload_len Length of payload


client_id Client ID to include in header


output Output buffer (allocated by caller)


out_len Output parameter for total packet length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 616 of file src/web/client.c.


617                                                               {
618   if (!output || !out_len) {
619     return -1;
620   }
621 
622   // Calculate CRC32 of payload (use software version for WASM)
623   uint32_t crc = payload && payload_len > 0 ? asciichat_crc32_sw(payload, payload_len) : 0;
624 
625   // Build packet header (convert to network byte order)
626   packet_header_t header = {.magic = HOST_TO_NET_U64(PACKET_MAGIC),
627                             .type = HOST_TO_NET_U16(packet_type),
628                             .length = HOST_TO_NET_U32((uint32_t)payload_len),
629                             .crc32 = HOST_TO_NET_U32(crc),
630                             .client_id = HOST_TO_NET_U32(client_id)};
631 
632   // Copy header to output
633   memcpy(output, &header, sizeof(packet_header_t));
634 
635   // Copy payload to output
636   if (payload && payload_len > 0) {
637     memcpy(output + sizeof(packet_header_t), payload, payload_len);
638   }
639 
640   *out_len = sizeof(packet_header_t) + payload_len;
641   return 0;
642 }






References asciichat_crc32_sw(), HOST_TO_NET_U16,
    HOST_TO_NET_U32, HOST_TO_NET_U64, and PACKET_MAGIC.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_set_server_address (const char * server_host, int
  server_port)


Set server address for known_hosts verification


Parameters


server_host Server hostname or IP address


server_port Server port number


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 234 of file src/web/client.c.


234                                                                         {
235   if (!g_initialized) {
236     return -1;
237   }
238 
239   if (!server_host || server_port <= 0 || server_port > 65535) {
240     return -1;
241   }
242 
243   // Set server IP and port in handshake context
244   SAFE_STRNCPY(g_crypto_handshake_ctx.server_ip, server_host, sizeof(g_crypto_handshake_ctx.server_ip));
245   g_crypto_handshake_ctx.server_port = server_port;
246 
247   return 0;
248 }






References SAFE_STRNCPY.






EM_JS
  (void , js_send_raw_packet , (const uint8_t *packet_data, size_t
  packet_len) , { if(!Module.sendPacketCallback) { console.error('[WASM]
  sendPacketCallback not registered - cannot send packet');return;} const
  packetArray=new Uint8Array(HEAPU8.buffer, packet_data, packet_len);const
  packetCopy=new Uint8Array(packetArray);var pktType=packetCopy.length >=10
  ?((packetCopy[8]<< 8)|packetCopy[9]) :-1;console.error('[WASM->JS]
  Sending raw packet:', packetCopy.length, 'bytes,
  type=0x'+pktType.toString(16));Module.sendPacketCallback(packetCopy);}
  )
